samples.draft_output: Python 的 `sorted()` 回傳一個新的 list，不會改動原本的 iterable；而 list 的 `.sort()` method 是 in-place 的，會改動原 list 並回傳 None。所以如果你在 chain 呼叫裡寫 `my_list.sort().reverse()`，會得到 AttributeError，因為 `.sort()` 回傳的是 None。要串起來請用 `sorted(my_list, reverse=True)`。

samples.draft_output: To debug a segfault in a C program, compile with `-g` for debug symbols, then run under gdb: `gdb ./your_program`, then `run` with your args. When it crashes, `bt` will give you a backtrace. Look for the topmost frame in your own code — that's usually where the bad pointer deref happened. Valgrind is also great here; it will also catch the segfault and additionally flag any use-after-free or double-free that happened earlier and only surfaced as a crash later.
